mapper.sql: id, title, estimated_pomodoros, completed_pomodoros, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (title, estimated_pomodoros, completed_pomodoros, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{estimatedPomodoros}, #{completedPomodoros}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET title = #{title}, estimated_pomodoros = #{estimatedPomodoros}, completed_pomodoros = #{completedPomodoros}, status = #{status}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM task WHERE DATE(created_time) = #{date} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM task ORDER BY created_time DESC
